subject: I made a website preview for He & She Hairstyling
body:
Hi,

I came across He & She Hairstyling in Cornwall and noticed you don't have a website yet. I went ahead and designed a quick 1-page preview concept for your barber business — with a hero section, services list, and contact form.

It's not live anywhere, just a concept to show what's possible. Want to see it?

— Mehdi
